acne.cause: Clogged hair follicles due to oil and dead skin cells.
acne.treatment: Use topical creams, benzoyl peroxide, or salicylic acid.
acne.routine: Wash face twice daily and avoid oily cosmetics.
acne.message: Acne is common and treatable. Stay consistent with skincare.

eczema.cause: Skin inflammation often linked to allergies or genetics.
eczema.routine: Avoid harsh soaps and keep skin hydrated.
eczema.message: Eczema can be managed well with proper care.

psoriasis.cause: Autoimmune condition causing rapid skin cell growth.
psoriasis.message: Psoriasis is manageable with medical treatment.

melanoma.message: Early detection greatly improves treatment success.

vitiligo.cause: Loss of skin pigment due to autoimmune destruction.
vitiligo.routine: Use sunscreen to protect depigmented skin.
vitiligo.message: Vitiligo does not affect overall health.

rosacea.routine: Avoid triggers like spicy foods and alcohol.
rosacea.message: Rosacea symptoms can be controlled with treatment.

warts.routine: Avoid touching warts to prevent spreading.
warts.message: Warts are common and usually harmless.

impetigo.routine: Keep affected areas clean and avoid scratching.
impetigo.message: Impetigo is treatable with proper antibiotics.

heart disease.cause: Blockage or narrowing of coronary arteries.
heart disease.treatment: Medication, lifestyle changes, surgery in severe cases.
heart disease.routine: Exercise regularly, eat healthy, avoid smoking.
heart disease.message: Heart health improves with lifestyle changes.

normal.message: You appear healthy. Keep maintaining good habits.
